metadata.description: CLI and Claude Code skills for diagnosing and fixing GitHub Actions CI/CD failures

plugins.name: fix-failing-actions
plugins.description: Diagnose and fix failing GitHub Actions CI/CD for the current branch. Fetches failures, analyzes logs, applies fixes, pushes, and watches until green.

plugins.name: watch-actions
plugins.description: Poll GitHub Actions workflow runs for the current branch until all checks pass green or timeout. Read-only, no code changes.
